text:
Want to learn the statistics needed for machine learning without getting confused?
This app makes it super easy.
It explains core topics like probability, regression, distributions, and compound probability in a simple visual way.
You don’t just study the concepts, you actually see them working.
It even lets you do live experiments, like flipping a coin 100 times, so you can understand probability in real time.
Honestly, it’s one of the easiest ways to learn machine learning statistics in a practical way.
Comment start and I’ll send you the link in DM.
